items.title: Ensure US Bank (Meghan Kober) virtual meeting with Echelon founders gets scheduled
items.context: Email from meghan.kober@usbank.com on May 14: 'It would be great to connect virtually. Please send over some dates and times that would work for you.' Fan facilitated the intro; Meghan can't attend PNP Summit.

items.title: Track IndyKite Series A progress and Hitachi Ventures intro outcome
items.context: Email from lasse.andresen@indykite.com on May 13: Series A progressing well — 11 VC firms reviewing dataroom, 1 draft term sheet on the table. PoCs with HSBC, Barclays, Nomura. Derek made intro to Hitachi Ventures (Gayathri).

items.title: Circle back with Ryo (SMBC) to align on key messages for AD management meeting re: Opti
items.context: Email from ryo.ishii@smbcgroup.com on May 16: 'I'd love to circle back as we prepare for the upcoming AD management meeting, especially to align on the key messages for Donna.' Rina shared Opti differentiation analysis.

items.title: Review Prism Layer seed round pitch deck sent by Simone
items.context: Email from simone@prismlayer.ai on May 15: 'Hi everyone--just finished our seed round pitch deck. Talk soon!' PDF attached (PL Pitch Deck v4). In-person meeting scheduled for May 26.

items.title: Prep for Security Breakfast planning call with Thoropass on May 21
items.context: Calendar event 'Security Breakfast Prep - Fin Capital & Thoropass' on May 21 at 12pm ET with Lauren, Jackie, Claire Lamb and Javier from Thoropass, plus Derek and Jake.

items.title: Prep for GetReal & FinCapital Investor Briefing on May 20
items.context: Calendar event 'GetReal & FinCapital | Investor Briefing' on May 20 at 3pm ET with Matt Moynahan, Jim, Hany, and Mark from GetReal Labs, plus Jake, Lissette, and Derek.

items.title: Prep for US Bank Security Discussion on May 22
items.context: Calendar event 'US Bank Security Discussion' on May 22 at 10:30am ET with David Ridgway (US Bank) and Jake — organized by Derek.
